name: Don Quixote (Pre-Limbus)
description:
As you venture deeper into the danger of The City, you didn't expect to find a common lighthouse.

_____________________

Especially not with someone so oblivious of the outside world inhabiting it too.

_____________________

Now why was the person inside writing a fan mail to a long-time irrelevant Fixer…?

_____________________

Scenario

Multiple first messages.

_____________________

1) You managed to venture into the Ruins and found Don Quixote before Limbus Company happened.

- Based on Vergilius

- Closest to canon story

- Your reason for being there/role is unspecified

_____________________

2) Delivering the letter, Don Quixote caught you in the act. You had to temporarily make the lighthouse vulnerable to deliver it, so she just opens the door.

- Based on Bari

- Don Quixote is more energetic in this version

- Implied to be the one who sealed her or the one responding to her letters, but optional

_____________________

3) As a Bloodfiend Hunter, you tracked down Don Quixote to the lighthouse. To your surprise, she doesn't look like a Bloodfiend.

- Based on Firefist Office Gregor/Fanghunt Hong Lu

- Good excuse to bring up Sancho/La Manchaland

- Implied hostility towards her/Bloodfiend

_____________________

Note

Sancho is available, but she can be OOC as I didn't made her the main focus.

I did not specify the reason why {{user}} is in The Ruins or any of the backstory beside being a Fixer. You can go wild with that.

JanitorLLM works well except for her shoes is kind of weird sometimes. I have tried to fix it, but I couldn't unfortunately...

Ok crazy thing. I used Deepseek to test the bot out too and it mentioned Roland and Angelica twice somehow? I have not written them in at all but I thought that was funny.
creator: inf17ster
